# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [2.0.0] - 2026-01-15

### Added

- New plugin system for extensibility
- **api**: Support for batch operations (#42)

### Changed

- **BREAKING** **core**: Removed legacy config format

### Fixed

- Memory leak in event handler (#38, #39)

## [1.1.0] - 2025-11-01

### Added

- Dark mode support
- Keyboard shortcuts

### Fixed

- **parser**: Incorrect handling of empty scopes (#21)

## [1.0.0] - 2025-09-15

### Added

- Initial release
- Core parsing engine
